response: TPGIT stands for Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology. It is a government engineering college in Vellore.
TPGIT is located at Bagayam, Vellore.
TPGIT address: Bagayam, Vellore - 632002.
TPGIT is affiliated to Anna University, Chennai.
TPGIT comes under the Directorate of Technical Education, Tamil Nadu.
College timing is 9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Friday.
Admissions are done through Anna University counselling.
Candidates should pass 12th standard with Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry.
Application is generally through online counselling. Please verify the current counselling fee on the official portal.
Government reservation rules are followed for eligible students.
TPGIT offers undergraduate engineering courses such as ECE, EEE, CSE, Mechanical, Civil, and related engineering branches.
Major engineering branches in TPGIT include CSE, ECE, EEE, Mechanical, and Civil.
College fees are comparatively low in TPGIT. Please check the latest fee structure at admission time for exact amounts.
Hostel facility is available for both boys and girls.
A library with academic and reference books is available for students.
Well-equipped laboratories are available for students in relevant departments.
Wi-Fi facility is available in the campus.
Sports and games facilities are available for students.
Government scholarships are available for eligible students.
A placement and career guidance facility is available for students.
A canteen facility is available inside the campus.
Transport details may vary. Please contact the college office for the latest bus and commute information.
Cultural, technical, and department-level events are conducted regularly.
Campus safety measures are followed and anti-ragging rules are enforced.
Please contact the TPGIT office for the latest official phone number and email details.
Please check the official college office or website for the latest principal and department head details.
Results are usually published through the university result system.
Semester exams are conducted as per Anna University academic regulations.
